name: RPlog_Chewbacca_and_Roark
title: Moving Roark to Yavin
summary: In a guarded cell, the imprisoned former CSA man Xegid Roark and the New Republic flight tech Jessalyn share a quiet, warm conversation about the missing Han Solo and a menacing stranger who recently visited Roark, hinting his lawyer had abandoned him and pressing for information. Chewbacca arrives with guards, alarmed, and insists Roark be moved aboard the freighter Black Dragon for his own safety until Dillon can be consulted, fearing the stranger means to compromise or kill him. A reluctant Roark, comforted and translated for by Jessalyn, is escorted through the Hyperon and onto the ship, which jumps to hyperspace bound for Yavin. Settled in the crew quarters, Roark and Jessalyn talk through his frustration at being treated like an object and her promise to help him survive, before bidding each other a gentle goodnight.
